title: geum alpinum
intro: Geum alpinum, also known as the alpine avens, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Geum alpinum has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat skin conditions, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
